pages.title: About Alberto | Alberto Costa
pages.meta_description: I was fortunate to have been first elected as the UK Member of Parliament for South Leicestershire in May 2015, then re-elected in 2017 with the largest vote share in the constituency’s history, increasing this further when re-elected in December 2019. I was then re-elected in 2024.
headings: h2: Main navigation
h3: Alberto Costa South Leicestershire
h2: Footer
pages.text_excerpt: About Alberto | Alberto Costa Skip to main content Alberto Costa Conservative MP for South Leicestershire Main navigation About Alberto News Campaigns In Parliament Contact Apply now: Alberto Costa's Westminster Summer School (16-19 year olds) Surgeries Alberto Costa Conservative MP for South Leicestershire About Alberto Tweet I was fortunate to have been first elected as the UK Member of Parliament for South Leicestershire in May 2015, then re-elected in 2017 with the largest vote share in the constituency’s history, increasing this further when re-elected in December 2019. I was then re-elected in 2024. I was appointed by former Prime Minister Theresa May as the Parliamentary Private Secretary to the Secretary of State for Scotland serving between 2017 and 2019 and then appointed by former Prime Minister Boris Johnson as the Parliamentary Private Secretary to the Attorney General, serving between 2020 and 2022. In 2024, I was elected as Chair of the House of Commons Standards Committee with cross-party support from my parliamentary colleagues. I was subsequently honoured to be elected by my Standards Committee colleagues as Chair of the House of Commons Privileges Committee. Since 2019, I have served on the House of Commons Committee on Standards and the separate Committee of Privileges, undertaking inquiries and adjudicating some of the most high profile conduct and standards issues in British parliamentary history. I live with my family in the constituency and am proud to call South Leicestershire home. I opened the first ever dedicated Parliamentary office in Blaby serving the whole constituency with a satellite office in Broughton Astley. My office has helped resolve hundreds of issues raised by constituents; from housing queries to social care, from school places to benefit matters, from tax issues to visa problems. The office has served as a focal point for the constituents of South Leicestershire and ensured strong democratic ties between local people and me as their elected MP in Parliament, during the most recent parliament. Public service is at the heart of what my team and I do. Raising local issues when in Parliament, has helped ensure that South Leicestershire has always had a strong and representative voice at the centre of power in our country. From challenging the Hinckley National Rail Freight Interchange proposals to supporting greater calls for fairer funding across Leicestershire. I am a passionate advocate for local South Leicestershire villages and communities in helping address the issues that matter to them. I served on the House of Commons Justice Select Committee between 2015 and 2017 scrutinising the work of the Ministry of Justice and undertook inquiries on aspects of the British criminal and civil justice systems. I am a lawyer by profession, qualified to practice as a solicitor in both England & Wales as well as Scotland. For further information or if you wish to Join the Conservative Party please contact: SLCA Office 01455 283594 Alberto Costa South Leicestershire Footer About RSS Accessibility Cookies Privacy About Alberto In Parliament Promoted by SLCA behalf of Alberto Costa, both at 3 Green Rd, Broughton Astley, Leicester, LE9 6RA Copyright 2026 Alberto Costa. Urge Labour to back our Cheap Power Plan which would cut everyone’s... Scrap Stamp Duty on main homes Sign our petition urging Labour to scrap Stamp Duty on main homes. Land and Property Management Companies - Have Your Say Many residents who own their property as both leaseholders and freeholders, particularly in a new-build estates, have raised issues with their property... Stop the Family Farm Tax Labour have broken their promise to British farmers with the Family Farm Tax. Labour's Family Farm Tax will stop farms being passed to the next generation... Petition: Save Leicester's New Hospitals Funding was announced by the Conservative Government in May 2023 for a new hospital at the Leicester Royal Infirmary for women's and ICU services, a midwifery... South Leicestershire local quality of life survey - share your views with Alberto Costa I am passionate about our villages and want to ensure that rural South Leicestershire remains a wonderful place to live. My local priorities already include... Alberto invites views on local transport investment Complete the survey below to have your say on where you would like to see investment in local infrastructure. My priorities for South Leicestershire Boosting our healthy Leicestershire economy still further by promoting our local shops, post offices and public houses in our villages and towns as community assets and partnering with businesses to offer more apprenticeships to younger people. Supporting sustainable development As a Conservative MP I do of course always support the creation of further employment and investment in both the local and national economy, however it is important that this development comes in a sustainable manner; not at the expense of our local environment and local infrastructure. Fairer funding for Leicestershire I am firmly committed to working with Leicestershire County Council to deliver fairer funding for Leicestershire. Leicestershire has, for a number of years, had a low level of spend relative to other local authorities, which has created pressures on spending and budgetary savings. Supporting our local businesses I am immensely proud that South Leicestershire is a home to a wonderful array of small, independent businesses and SMEs as well as other larger organisations such as Next, Everards and Britvic. Delivering a better future Without a doubt, one of the most enjoyable aspects of my role as Member of Parliament is visiting the fantastic businesses, schools and charities we have in South Leicestershire. pages.text_excerpt: Contact | Alberto Costa Skip to main content Alberto Costa Conservative MP for South Leicestershire Main navigation About Alberto News Campaigns In Parliament Contact Apply now: Alberto Costa's Westminster Summer School (16-19 year olds) Surgeries Alberto Costa Conservative MP for South Leicestershire Contact Leave this field blank Office of Alberto Costa Unit 3, 8A Lutterworth Road Blaby LE8 4DN 0116 278 1924 [email protected] Alberto Costa Alberto Costa My office welcomes correspondence expressing your views. We respect those who have passionately held views. However, you will equally understand that we should all have the right to a working environment free from abuse. My office has a zero tolerance approach to abusive, aggressive or offensive correspondence – any such correspondence may be, if necessary, forwarded to the police. You will, I am sure agree, that correspondence of this nature is entirely unnecessary. All of us have the right to be treated with respect so please do keep this in mind before contacting my office. First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . Volunteer for us In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.
